data.title: Solana Ecosystem Token Issuance Platform Cooking.City Completes $7 Million Financing, Jump Crypto Leads Investment
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Solana Ecosystem Token Issuance Platform Cooking.City has completed a $7 million financing round, led by Jump Crypto, with participation from CMT Digital, Mirana, Bitscale Capital and EVG. Cooking.City is committed to reshaping the token issuance mechanism and proposing a new on-chain issuance model that is sustainable, incentive-rewarding, and community-centered.
The new model proposed by Cooking.City includes: value redistribution (redistributing most platform fees to developers and users), "confidence pool" mechanism (token issuers need to deposit a certain amount of funds in the smart contract in advance), and a social-based value distribution system (introducing a referral rebate system and redistributing fees within the ecosystem, with most fees used for community recommendations and transaction rewards, part returned to the token issuer, and the rest invested in the long-term development of the platform).

data.title: Can Cardano Price Rally Amid Whale Accumulation and eToro ADA Relisting?
data.description:
In seven days, Cardano (ADA) whales purchased over 180 million tokens, leading to Cardano price rally speculation. At the same time, investors will have more chances to join as eToro relists Cardano. These developments happen while the SEC continues to look into Grayscale’s application for the ADA ETF
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/29/can-cardano-price-rally-amid-whale-accumulation-and-etoro-ada-relisting/

data.title: US Treasury imposes sanctions on Philippine company involved in virtual currency scam
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Treasury Department is imposing sanctions on a Philippine company accused of providing Internet infrastructure to a series of virtual currency investment scams. U.S. Treasury officials said in a statement released Thursday that they are taking action against Funnull Technology Inc., accusing the company of buying Internet Protocol addresses in bulk from other service providers and reselling them to cybercriminals.

data.title: Michael Saylor shares "21 Ways to Get Rich" at Bitcoin 2025 Conference
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy founder Michael Saylor gave a keynote speech at the Bitcoin 2025 Conference in Las Vegas on Thursday, praising Bitcoin and expounding on the guiding principles of what he called "21 ways to get rich" to the audience and attendees.
Michael Saylor said, "Satoshi Nakamoto lit a fire in cyberspace. Those who are timid will flee from it, the ignorant will dance around it, and the loyal will add fuel to the fire, embracing the dream of a better world and bathing in the warmth of the light of the Internet. Many people will be afraid when they see Bitcoin. They will never touch it, never benefit from it, and eventually be left behind by the times. But those who really understand it will add fuel to the fire. Buying Bitcoin is adding fuel to the fire."
Michael Saylor said, "Take out your fiat currency and exchange it for Bitcoin. Take out your long-term capital and exchange it for Bitcoin. Sell your bonds and exchange them for Bitcoin. Sell your bad stocks, sell your bad real estate, and buy Bitcoin." This is the third way to get rich: courage. In addition to courage, Michael Saylor also advised the audience to have faith in the potential of Bitcoin. (Coindesk)

data.title: Huang Licheng's HYPE long position currently has a floating loss of more than $1.8 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, Huang Licheng currently has a floating loss of $1.81 million on long HYPE contracts. He bought 200,000 HYPE spot at $29.4 some time ago, and then used the contract to buy 530,000 HYPE with 5 times leverage, with an average opening price of $35.5.
With the callback of HYPE prices in the past two days, his long HYPE contracts have currently lost $1.81 million. However, the 200,000 HYPE he holds in spot still has a profit of $520,000.

-ETH IC0 1 million ETH whale recharged 959.69 ETH to OKX 5 hours ago, worth $2.54 million; there are still 50704 ETH left on the chain, worth $132 million.

data.title: Fluence (FLT) announces its 2026 vision to accelerate the deployment of AI computing market with RWA tokenization
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Fluence announced its 2026 vision and will launch four new initiatives on June 1, committed to building the world's leading RWA tokenized computing platform.
Initiatives include: Guardian Plan-Establish a global monitoring computing network; Meaningless Plan-Reward community contributions; Token repurchase plan-Establish a deflation mechanism; AI computing function-Add new hardware support such as GPU.
It is reported that Fluence has established an enterprise-level decentralized computing network, operated by global data centers, and the native token FLT is used to guarantee computing resources. The platform has currently generated millions of dollars in annualized revenue for providers, locked more than 25 million FLT, and saved customers more than 4 million US dollars in cloud computing costs.
In addition, Fluence will expand its service scope, enhance computing capabilities, and use the advantages of decentralization to deal with network security threats. By 2026, Fluence plans to deploy a monitoring network globally through guardian nodes to create a safe and reliable computing infrastructure ecosystem.

data.title: Trump and Musk to Hold Press Conference in Oval Office
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that he will hold a press conference with Elon Musk in the Oval Office at 1:30 PM Eastern Time (1:30 AM UTC+8) on Saturday. Trump mentioned that this event marks Musk's last day in his current role, but added that Musk will always remain with them in spirit.

data.title: Pantera Capital Highlights Key Investments in Crypto Firms
data.description: According to Foresight News, Pantera Capital has revealed its strategic investments in a portfolio of publicly traded companies holding crypto assets. In an investor memo, the firm highlighted its primary investment targets, which include Twenty One Capital, a Bitcoin reserve company backed by Tether and SoftBank. Additionally, Pantera is focusing on DeFi Development, which specializes in Solana, and Sharplink Gaming, an Ethereum-holding enterprise supported by ConsenSys.

data.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Plans Bitcoin Fund with Gold Hedge
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Wall Street investment bank Cantor Fitzgerald is set to launch a Bitcoin fund hedged with gold. The fund is designed to operate for five years, offering a mechanism that retains the potential for Bitcoin price appreciation while providing 1:1 downside protection through a gold linkage.

Cantor Fitzgerald Chairman Brandon Lutnick announced at the Bitcoin 2025 conference that the product aims to attract traditional investors who are cautious about Bitcoin into the crypto ecosystem. The institution has previously engaged in Bitcoin lending activities, with initial partners including crypto lending platform Maple and brokerage FalconX.
